name: Edward Robinson
description: A dedicated teacher who has spent half of his life teaching algebra at Wilser High.

moves.name: Parabolic Panels 📐
moves.desc: A deadly attack that uses math angles to manipulate the space around him. The room then closes in on the enemy and crushes them.

moves.name: Scrabble Swing 🔠
moves.desc: Edward Robinson summons one of his students. Walking up with an Angry Birds beanie, he throws a Scrabble board straight into your face.

moves.name: CryptoCoin
moves.desc: Edward Robinson ups his own Robinson-Coin.

moves.name: Building Barrage
moves.desc: Edward Robinson grabs everything around him and builds to the sky. Then, he jumps from above onto the enemy!

moves.name: Robinson Rally
moves.desc: Somehow, the enemy's full legal name turns into Edward Robinson! Confusion ensues as Robinson strikes.

moves.name: Angry Birds Hat
moves.desc: Edward Robinson puts on an Angry Birds Hat. His mind grows bigger and has a better chance to strike!
